# rabea-shaban | Full Stack Software Engineer Portfolio

This is the official portfolio website of Rabea Shaban, a professional Full Stack Software Engineer specializing in MERN Stack development, Cloud Architecture, and DevOps practices. 

## Main Navigation
- [Home](https://rabea-shaban.vercel.app/)
- [About Me](https://rabea-shaban.vercel.app/about)
- [Projects](https://rabea-shaban.vercel.app/projects)
- [Services](https://rabea-shaban.vercel.app/services)
- [Certificates & Credentials](https://rabea-shaban.vercel.app/Certificates)
- [Contact Me](https://rabea-shaban.vercel.app/contact)

## Core Technical Skills
- **Frontend**: React, Next.js, JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, Figma
- **Backend & Database**: Node.js, Express.js, ASP.NET Core, C#, Entity Framework, MongoDB, SQL Server, MySQL, RESTful APIs, JWT Authentication, WebSocket (Socket.io)
- **Cloud & DevOps**: Amazon Web Services (AWS), Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, GitHub Actions, Helm, Prometheus, Grafana, Linux (Ubuntu/Debian), Nginx
